description: Composition Purple sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester fleece, has a hood with drawstrings, full sleeves with embroidered branding on both sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, NBA graphic print and appliqué on the chest and a pouch pocket on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Wash below 40 degrees separately Do not dry clean Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Proudly display your support for the LA Lakers with this bright hooded sweatshirt from adidas. Whether you play Basketball yourself or just love watching the game, this hoodie is for you. The cotton blend fabric has a fleecy back making is soft and cosy next to you skin. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
